reason: Types intentionally outside the normal WinMD-covered generation gate. Each entry is classified with an explicit reason category.

categories.native_interop: C++ interop header only, not in any WinMD. Must remain hand-written.
categories.internal_abi: Custom internal ABI type, not a public WinMD type.
categories.cross_module: Type exists in Windows.winmd (system WinMD), not Microsoft.UI.Xaml.winmd. Generator can resolve these as dependencies but cannot target them directly for generation.
categories.consumer_alias: Consumer (ghostty-win) uses an alias name for a type that IS in WinMD under its canonical name. Generator produces the canonical version correctly. Downstream migration is tracked in ghostty #59.

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.hosting.h), not in WinMD

types.name: IWindowNative
types.why: C++ interop header, COM/native bridge, not normal WinRT projection

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative2
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.media.dxinterop.h), not in WinMD. Extended native swap chain interface.

types.name: IApplicationAbi
types.why: Internal ABI for Application.Resources access, not a public WinMD type

types.name: IVector
types.why: Windows.Foundation.Collections.IVector<IInspectable> — in Windows.winmd. Resolved as dependency via companion metadata (#120), but findTypeDefRow cannot target companion types directly for standalone generation.

types.name: IPropertyValue
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValue — in Windows.winmd. Same limitation as IVector.

types.name: IPropertyValueStatics
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValueStatics — in Windows.winmd. Same limitation as IVector.

types.name: IFrameworkElement2
types.why: ghostty-win alias for IFrameworkElement (IID fe08f13d). IFrameworkElement exists in Xaml WinMD and generates correctly. 'IFrameworkElement2' does not exist in WinMD — it is a consumer naming convention. Downstream migration: ghostty #59.

types.name: IPanel2
types.why: ghostty-win alias for IPanel. IPanel exists in Xaml WinMD and generates correctly. 'IPanel2' does not exist in WinMD — it is a consumer naming convention. Downstream migration: ghostty #59.

removed.name: IWindow2
removed.reason: IWindow2 exists in Xaml WinMD (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.IWindow2). Generator produces correct vtable with IID, all methods, and wrappers. Verified by SHAPE #122 exact shape probe. The original 'vtable offset' concern was unfounded — each interface has its own independent vtable.

removed.name: ITabView2
removed.reason: ITabView2 exists in Xaml WinMD (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Controls.ITabView2). Generator produces correct vtable. Verified by SHAPE #122 exact shape probe.
